Container.Name: ezBookkeeping
Container.Overview:
ezBookkeeping is a lightweight, self-hosted personal finance / bookkeeping app with a modern responsive web UI and PWA support. Supports multi-currency, transaction categories, accounts, statistics and charts, import/export, and 2FA.
Defaults to SQLite stored under /ezbookkeeping/data. For MySQL/PostgreSQL set the EBK_DATABASE_* variables (any ezbookkeeping.ini option can be overridden via an EBK_SECTION_OPTION environment variable).
The container runs as UID/GID 1000:1000, so the host appdata folder must be owned by 1000:1000. Before first start, open the Unraid terminal and run:
mkdir -p /mnt/user/appdata/ezbookkeeping/{data,storage,log,conf} chown -R 1000:1000 /mnt/user/appdata/ezbookkeeping
If you change the host paths in this template, run chown -R 1000:1000 against those paths instead.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: HTTP port for the ezBookkeeping web interface.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Persistent data directory. Holds the SQLite database when using the default database backend.

Config.Name: Storage
Config.Description: Object storage for user uploads (avatars, transaction pictures, etc.).

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: Optional. Mount a folder containing a custom ezbookkeeping.ini to override the built-in config. Leave blank to use defaults plus EBK_* environment variables.

Config.Name: Security Secret Key
Config.Description: Random string used to encrypt sensitive user data. CHANGE this to a long random string before first start (e.g. openssl rand -hex 32). Changing it later will invalidate existing tokens/2FA secrets.

Config.Name: Server Domain
Config.Description: The domain or IP used to reach the WebUI (e.g. ezbookkeeping.example.com or 192.168.1.50). Used to build correct URLs in emails and the PWA.

Config.Name: Database Type
Config.Description: Database backend: sqlite3 (default, no extra setup), mysql, or postgres. When set to mysql/postgres, also fill in the Database Host/Name/User/Password fields below.

Config.Name: Database Host
Config.Description: Only used when Database Type is mysql or postgres. host:port of the database server — e.g. mariadb:3306 if you run MariaDB as a separate Unraid container on the bridge network.

Config.Name: Database Name
Config.Description: Only used when Database Type is mysql or postgres. Name of the database to use (must already exist on the DB server).

Config.Name: Database User
Config.Description: Only used when Database Type is mysql or postgres. Username with full privileges on the database above.

Config.Name: Database Password
Config.Description: Only used when Database Type is mysql or postgres. Password for the database user.

Config.Name: Log Mode
Config.Description: Optional. Log output mode: console, file, or console,file. Leave blank for the image default.
